response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment of 'Roman to Soroban' from 00:00 to 04:03. 2. Identified the talking segment from 04:03 to 04:55. 3. Searched for lyrics using '浪漫と算盤 椎名林檎 歌詞' and found the official lyrics on j-lyric.net and saluteproject.com. 4. Translated the lyrics for the English section. 5. Mapped the scenes based on the visual and audio transitions.
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song 'Roman to Soroban' by two VTubers, followed by a post-performance conversation. The video is from the 'Otonose Kanade Birthday Festival 2026'.

scenes.description: Two VTubers perform 'Roman to Soroban' (Romanticism and the Abacus) on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
主義を以って利益を成した場合は
商いが食い扶持以上の意味を宿す
義務と権利双方重んじつつ飽く迄
両者割合は有耶無耶にしていたい
玄人衆素人衆皆の衆賛否両論頂戴
置きに行こうなんぞ野暮
新しい技毎度練り出したいです
苦しくとも僕には判っている
貴方も同じ様にひとり生きている
宇宙を因数分解したとこで自由と
孤独だけが待っているんでしょう
玄人で素人で労働者で生活者の侭
面白可笑しく居させて
煩わしい役毎度請け負いたいです
虚しくとも貴方を思うたび
僕は赦されていく夢と現を結わえて
屹度そう浪漫抱えたら算盤弾いて
両極のど真ん中狙い撃って
お願い勇気をおくれ・・
疑わしい相手ならいつだって
自分ずっと進化したいよね
答え合わせ貴方を知るほど
僕は正されていく
捨てた物じゃないただ生きようと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If you achieve profit through principle
Trade holds more meaning than just making a living
While valuing both duties and rights
I want to keep the ratio of the two ambiguous
Experts, amateurs, everyone, give me your pros and cons
Playing it safe is foolish
I want to keep practicing new techniques every time
Even if it's painful, I know
That you are living alone in the same way
Even if you factorize the universe, only freedom and
Loneliness will be waiting, right?
As an expert, amateur, worker, and someone living my life
Let me stay fun and interesting
I want to take on annoying roles every time
Even if it's hollow, every time I think of you
I am forgiven, weaving dreams and reality
I'm sure if you hold onto romance, play with the abacus
Aim right at the middle of both extremes, please give me courage..
If it's a suspicious partner, always
I want to keep evolving
Checking the answers, the more I know you
I am corrected
It's not something to throw away, I'll just live

scenes.description: The VTubers have a conversation after their performance.
Final part of the segment leading into the end of the video.
